text:
LONG NAME: BENE_RSDNC_SSA_CNTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Each state has a series of codes beginning with '000' for each county within that state. Certain cities 
within that state have their own code. 

County codes must be combined with state codes to locate the specific county. The coding system is 
the SSA system, not the Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS). 

In some cases, the code may not be the actual county where the beneficiary
